title: Combobox
description: Foldkit-native shadcn base-nova Combobox wrapper composed from the local Base UI Combobox primitive, local shadcn Button and Input class conventions, local class canonicalization, local SVG chevron/check/x icons, deterministic slot classes, and local static examples for basic, clear, grouped, input-group, multiple, disabled, invalid, popup, auto-highlight, custom item, and RTL variants.

registry.reason: shadcn Combobox composes the local Base UI Combobox primitive.
shadcn Combobox reuses local Button variant classes for trigger, clear, and chip remove controls.
shadcn Combobox reuses local Input classes for input-group controls.
shadcn Combobox uses the local class composition helper.

runtime.reason: Provides Html, Attribute, and html factory APIs for the Foldkit-native wrapper and examples.
Provides Effect Schema literals for Combobox style options.
Provided through the local utils/cn registry dependency.
Provided through the local utils/cn registry dependency.

development.reason: Origin Base UI React primitive is replaced by the local Foldkit Base UI Combobox implementation.
Origin chevron, check, and x icons are represented by local inline SVG helpers in this batch.
React is origin fixture evidence only, not installable Foldkit source.
Origin RTL example dependency is replaced by local deterministic RTL example data.
Examples use local static field shells to preserve Combobox demo output without broadening installable composition scope.
The origin InputGroup source is folded into this wrapper's class helpers because no local installable input-group registry item exists yet.
The custom item example uses local static markup instead of importing another origin runtime dependency.

examples.title: ComboboxBasic
ComboboxWithClear
examples.description: Combobox with a selected framework and clear button.
examples.snippet:
export const ComboboxWithClear = (): Html =>
  comboboxShell({
    id: 'combobox-clear',
    items: frameworks,
    placeholder: 'Select a framework',
    value: 'next',
    showClear: true,
  })

examples.title: ComboboxWithGroupsAndSeparator
examples.description: Combobox grouped by timezone region with separators.
examples.snippet:
export const ComboboxWithGroupsAndSeparator = (): Html =>
  comboboxShell({
    id: 'combobox-groups',
    items: allTimezones(),
    placeholder: 'Select a timezone',
    emptyText: 'No timezones found.',
    groups: timezoneGroups,
  })

examples.title: ComboxboxInputGroup
examples.description: Combobox with input-group shell and aligned popup.

examples.title: ComboboxMultiple
examples.description: Multiple combobox with selected chips and chip input.
examples.snippet:
export const ComboboxMultiple = (): Html =>
  comboboxShell({
    id: 'combobox-multiple',
    items: frameworks,
    placeholder: 'Add framework',
    selectionMode: 'multiple',
    values: ['next'],
    highlightedValue: 'sveltekit',
    autoHighlight: true,
    anchorToChips: true,
    chipsClassName: 'w-full max-w-xs',
  })

examples.title: ComboboxDisabled
ComboboxInvalid
examples.description: Invalid combobox inside a local static field shell.

examples.title: ComboboxPopup
examples.description: Combobox with button trigger and input rendered inside the popup.

examples.title: ComboboxAutoHighlight
examples.snippet:
export const ComboboxAutoHighlight = (): Html =>
  comboboxShell({
    id: 'combobox-auto-highlight',
    items: frameworks,
    placeholder: 'Select a framework',
    highlightedValue: 'next',
    autoHighlight: true,
  })

examples.title: ComboboxWithCustomItems
examples.description: Combobox with country labels and text values.
examples.snippet:
export const ComboboxWithCustomItems = (): Html =>
  comboboxShell({
    id: 'combobox-custom',
    items: countries,
    placeholder: 'Search countries...',
    inputValue: 'a',
    emptyText: 'No countries found.',
  })

examples.title: ComboboxRtl
examples.description: RTL multiple combobox with local Arabic strings.

deviations.summary: The shadcn wrapper composes local Combobox attributes instead of importing upstream Base UI React primitives.
deviations.rationale: Installable Foldkit source must not import React or upstream Base UI runtime packages.

deviations.summary: Chevron, check, and x icons use local inline SVG helpers instead of lucide-react.
deviations.rationale: Installable source cannot depend on lucide-react. The local SVGs preserve the icon slots, geometry, and aria-hidden contract.

deviations.summary: InputGroup and InputGroupButton origin classes are represented locally because no installable shadcn/input-group registry item is present.
deviations.rationale: The plan allows composing local input/button/cn conventions and should not introduce a new adjacent component slice inside this Combobox batch.

deviations.summary: Examples use local static Field, Item, and language shells instead of importing adjacent origin app dependencies.
deviations.rationale: The Combobox slice stays focused while preserving the relevant Combobox DOM, class, ARIA, filtering, selected value, chip, and visual contracts.

deviations.summary: RTL example uses local constants instead of the origin language-selector runtime dependency.
deviations.rationale: Installable source cannot depend on the origin app language selector. Local Arabic example constants preserve the rendered RTL output.

deviations.summary: Positioner and content expose side, align, offset, collision, and chips-anchor attributes without runtime DOM measurement or collision flipping.
deviations.rationale: Measured collision behavior belongs behind a shared measurement service, not inside the shadcn render helper.
